Our Story

A Luxury Escape Into Wayanad's Finest Landscapes

Perched at the edge of Wayanad's most breathtaking valleys, Land's End Resort is where rolling mist-covered mountains meet the warmth of authentic Kerala hospitality. Here, every sunrise paints the horizon in hues of gold and amber, and every evening brings a silence only nature can compose.

Our resort is crafted for those who seek more than a destination — those who seek a feeling. Surrounded by centuries-old forests, fragrant spice gardens, and crisp mountain air, every moment at Land's End is an invitation to breathe deeper, feel lighter, and live fully.

From our handcrafted wooden cottages that echo Kerala's architectural heritage to our infinity pool that seems to dissolve into the clouds, we have designed every detail to honour the landscape around us.

Where You Rest

Luxury Stays With Nature At Your Doorstep

Each room and cottage at Land's End is a sanctuary of warmth, crafted from natural wood and stone, opening into private verandas that frame Wayanad's living panorama.

Private villa with panoramic views and forest veranda

Deluxe Wood Room

Handcrafted teak interiors with warm ambient lighting

Premium Suite

Traditional Kerala woodwork with contemporary comforts

Valley View Rooms

The Land's End Experience

Mornings That Change You

There is a certain silence at Land's End that arrives just before dawn — when the valley holds its breath and the mountains emerge slowly from the mist. Guests speak of it as the moment they truly arrived. Our terraces face the horizon with purpose; every seat is the best seat. Whether you're sipping tea as clouds drift below you, or swimming into a sunset that sets the peaks on fire, you'll understand why guests return, year after year, to this edge of the world.

Valley Views Infinity Pool Forest Walks Candlelit Dining Sunrise Terraces Mountain Air Plantation Tours Weekend Retreats
Resort Facilities

Everything You Need, Surrounded by Nature

Infinity Pool

A striking infinity pool perched against misty peaks — dive into one of the most dramatic swimming experiences in Wayanad.

In-House Dining

Savour authentic Kerala cuisine and grilled delicacies prepared from fresh local ingredients, served by candlelight.

Games Room

Billiards, table tennis, and foosball — an indoor retreat for families and friends seeking spirited leisure.

Cloud Terrace

Sit above the clouds at our signature terrace and watch nature's most spectacular show unfold before your eyes.

Nature Trails

Guided walks through the surrounding forest, spice plantations, and viewpoints that open into sweeping valley vistas.

Premium Hospitality

From arrival to farewell, our team ensures every detail of your stay is attended to with warmth and precision.

Wayanad, Kerala
The Region

Discover the Magic of Wayanad

Wayanad is not merely a destination — it is a state of mind. Cloaked in ancient forests, threaded with silver rivers, and carpeted in tea and coffee plantations that stretch to the horizon, this highland district of Kerala carries a rare and unhurried beauty.

From the viewpoints of Meppadi where the land seems to fall away into infinity, to the rich tribal culture and colonial-era spice estates, Wayanad offers travellers a journey as much inward as outward. The air is always a few degrees cooler here, the colours always a shade more vivid.

At Land's End, you are placed at the finest vantage point of all — a resort that frames Wayanad's soul in every window and on every terrace.

What Our Guests Say

★★★★★

"The view from our cottage was unlike anything we had ever seen. Waking up to misty mountains and absolute silence was the most luxurious experience of our lives."

Priya & Rahul Menon
Bangalore, Karnataka
★★★★★

"The infinity pool at sunset stole my heart completely. The staff were exceptional, and the food was authentic and outstanding. Land's End is a cut above anything in Wayanad."

Ananya Krishnan
Kochi, Kerala
★★★★★

"We came for a weekend and stayed for five days. The wooden rooms, the forest walks, the terrace where clouds literally drift past you — this place is magical. We will return."

Sanjay Patel
Chennai, Tamil Nadu

"Perfect for our anniversary. The candlelit dinner with valley views, the private cottage, the morning mist — every moment felt curated just for us. Absolutely recommend."
